title: Lordphenex Spawner Pickaxe
description: Get your hands on a powerful but fragile pickaxe which can be used to move spawners around
body:
Spawners are not always located where we would like them to be. But no worries ! With this pickaxe you are now able to move spawners wherever you need them to be. But be aware, so much power comes with some weaknesses : you will only be able to break up to 2 spawners before your pickaxe breaks.

Making this pickaxe is fairly easy, you just need a strong enough diamond pickaxe that needs to be reinforced with some netherite. Don't forget to use a totem of undying, as well as a ghast tear to be able to capture the spawner essence.
